name: Costco Anywhere Visa® Business Card by Citi

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer; cash back card

earning_rates.notes: 4% cash back on the first $7,000 per year, then 1% thereafter
3% cash back on restaurants (no annual cap)
3% cash back on eligible travel (no annual cap)
2% cash back at Costco (no annual cap)
1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: No Foreign Transaction Fee
other_benefits.description: Use the card internationally with no added fees

other_benefits.name: Extended Warranty
other_benefits.description: Extends manufacturer warranty by up to 2 years on eligible items

other_benefits.name: Travel Accident Insurance
other_benefits.description: Coverage for common carrier travel accidents

notes: Requires a paid Costco membership. Cash back paid as an annual credit on the February statement of the following year. Card is issued by Citi but branded Costco Anywhere Visa.
